column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Opening window shutters to morning sunlight" | TEXT="おはようございます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Deep breathing in a morning garden with mist" | TEXT="良き一日を" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Watering plants with a refreshing smile" | TEXT="清々しい朝ですわ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Folding bedding neatly in the morning breeze" | TEXT="目が覚めましたの？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Preparing a fresh breakfast tray" | TEXT="朝餉（あさげ）をどうぞ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a morning glory flower blooming" | TEXT="今日も頑張りましょう" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Standing straight in a sunbeam" | TEXT="凛とした朝ですわね" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a bird feeder for chirping birds" | TEXT="小鳥も快活です" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Refreshing her face with a cool cloth" | TEXT="目覚ましに一杯いかが？"
